acceptance_criteria.text: Active industry patterns are loaded as structured versions and recorded when used in service optimization.
Service optimization records result impact metrics for active patterns.
Telegram superadmin health screen exposes active pattern impact and disable actions.
Production schema migrated safely after backup.
Relevant tests and production smoke checks completed.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
known_gaps: Full pytest has unrelated environment/integration failures requiring localhost:8000, missing fixture business_id, and obsolete parser helper methods.
Measurement is observational and not A/B attribution.
